name: AboveAverage
summary: Represents an above average visual of a conditional formatting rule. Applies a color or fill to a range or selection to help you see the value of a cell relative to other cells.

name: Action
summary: Represents an action to be executed in a PivotTable or sheet data.

name: Actions
summary: A collection of all Action objects for the specified series.

name: AddIn
summary: Represents a single add-in, either installed or not installed.

name: AddIns
summary: A collection of AddIn objects that represents all the add-ins available to Microsoft Excel, regardless of whether they're installed.

name: AddIns2
summary: A collection of AddIn objects that represent all the add-ins that are currently available or open in Microsoft Excel, regardless of whether they are installed.

name: Adjustments
summary: Contains a collection of adjustment values for the specified AutoShape, WordArt object, or connector.

name: AllowEditRange
summary: Represents the cells that can be edited on a protected worksheet.

name: AllowEditRanges
summary: A collection of all the AllowEditRange objects that represent the cells that can be edited on a protected worksheet.

name: Application
summary: Represents the entire Microsoft Excel application.

name: Areas
summary: A collection of the areas, or contiguous blocks of cells, within a selection.

name: Author
summary: Represents the author of the CommentThreaded object.

name: AutoCorrect
summary: Contains Microsoft Excel AutoCorrect attributes (capitalization of names of days, correction of two initial capital letters, automatic correction list, and so on).

name: AutoFilter
summary: Represents autofiltering for the specified worksheet.

name: AutoRecover
summary: Represents the automatic recovery features of a workbook.

name: Axes
summary: A collection of all the Axis.md) objects in the specified chart.

name: Axis
summary: Represents a single axis in a chart.

name: AxisTitle
summary: Represents a chart axis title.

name: Border
summary: Represents the border of an object.

name: Borders
summary: A collection of four Border.md) objects that represent the four borders of a Range.md) object or Style object.

name: CalculatedFields
summary: A collection of PivotField objects that represents all the calculated fields in the specified PivotTable report.

name: CalculatedItems
summary: A collection of PivotItem objects that represents all the calculated items in the specified PivotTable report.

name: CalculatedMember
summary: Represents the calculated fields, calculated items, and named sets for PivotTables with Online Analytical Processing (OLAP) data sources.

name: CalculatedMembers
summary: A collection of all the CalculatedMember objects on the specified PivotTable.

name: CalloutFormat
summary: Contains properties and methods that apply to line callouts.

name: CategoryCollection
summary: Represents the collection of visible chart categories in the chart.

name: CellControl
summary: This is a child of the Range object, representing the cell controls contained within that range. Properties and methods here let you inspect and modify the cell controls on the range.

name: CellFormat
summary: Represents the search criteria for the cell format.

name: Characters
summary: Represents characters in an object that contains text.

name: Chart
summary: Represents a chart in a workbook.

name: ChartArea
summary: Represents the chart area of a chart.

name: ChartFormat
summary: Provides access to the Office Art formatting for chart elements.

name: ChartGroup
summary: Represents one or more series plotted in a chart with the same format.

name: ChartGroups
summary: Represents one or more series plotted in a chart with the same format.

name: ChartObject
summary: Represents an embedded chart on a worksheet.

name: ChartObjects
summary: A collection of all the ChartObject objects on the specified chart sheet, dialog sheet, or worksheet.

name: ChartTitle
summary: Represents the chart title.

name: ChartView
summary: Represents a view of a chart.

name: Charts
summary: A collection of all the chart sheets in the specified or active workbook.

name: ColorFormat
summary: Represents the color of a one-color object, the foreground or background color of an object with a gradient or patterned fill, or the pointer color.

name: ColorScale
summary: Represents a color scale conditional formatting rule.

name: ColorScaleCriteria
summary: A collection of ColorScaleCriterion objects that represents all of the criteria for a color scale conditional format. Each criterion specifies the minimum, midpoint, or maximum threshold for the color scale.

name: ColorScaleCriterion
summary: Represents the criteria for the minimum, midpoint, or maximum thresholds for a color format conditional format.

name: ColorStop
summary: Represents the color stop point for a gradient fill in a range or selection.

name: ColorStops
summary: A collection of all the ColorStop objects for the specified series.

name: Comment
summary: Represents a cell comment.

name: CommentThreaded
summary: Represents a cell's threaded comment. This object can represent both a top-level comment or its replies.

name: Comments
summary: A collection of cell comments.

name: CommentsThreaded
summary: A collection of top-level CommentThreaded objects in a Worksheet, or a collection of replies in a single threaded comment.

name: ConditionValue
summary: Represents how the shortest bar or longest bar is evaluated for a data bar conditional formatting rule.

name: Connections
summary: A collection of WorkbookConnection objects for the specified workbook.

name: ConnectorFormat
summary: Contains properties and methods that apply to connectors.

name: ControlFormat
summary: Contains Microsoft Excel control properties.

name: CubeField
summary: Represents a hierarchy or measure field from an OLAP cube. In a PivotTable report, the CubeField object is a member of the CubeFields collection.

name: CubeFields
summary: A collection of all CubeField objects in a PivotTable report that is based on an OLAP cube. Each CubeField object represents a hierarchy or measure field from the cube.

name: CustomProperties
summary: A collection of CustomProperty objects that represents additional information. The information can be used as metadata for XML.

name: CustomProperty
summary: Represents identifier information, which can be used as metadata for XML.

name: CustomView
summary: Represents a custom workbook view.

name: CustomViews
summary: A collection of custom workbook views.

name: DataBarBorder
summary: Represents the border of the data bars specified by a conditional formatting rule.

name: DataLabel
summary: Represents the data label on a chart point or trendline.

name: DataLabels
summary: A collection of all the DataLabel.md) objects for the specified series.

name: DataTable
summary: Represents a chart data table.

name: Databar
summary: Represents a data bar conditional formating rule. Applying a data bar to a range helps you see the value of a cell relative to other cells.

name: DefaultWebOptions
summary: Contains global application-level attributes used by Microsoft Excel when you save a document as a webpage or open a webpage. You can return or set attributes either at the application (global) level or at the workbook level.

name: Dialog
summary: Represents a built-in Microsoft Excel dialog box.

name: DialogSheetView
summary: Represents the current Dialog sheet view in a workbook.

name: Dialogs
summary: A collection of all the Dialog objects in Microsoft Excel.

name: DisplayFormat
summary: Represents the display settings for an associated Range.md) object. Read-only.

name: DisplayUnitLabel
summary: Represents a unit label on an axis in the specified chart.

name: DownBars
summary: Represents the down bars in a chart group.

name: DropLines
summary: Represents the drop lines in a chart group.

name: Error
summary: Represents a spreadsheet error for a range.

name: ErrorBars
summary: Represents the error bars in a chart series.

name: ErrorCheckingOptions
summary: Represents the error-checking options for an application.

name: Errors
summary: Represents the various spreadsheet errors for a range.

name: FileExportConverter
summary: Represents a file converter that is used to save files.

name: FileExportConverters
summary: A collection of FileExportConverter objects that represent all the file converters available for saving files.

name: FillFormat
summary: Represents fill formatting for a shape.

name: Filter
summary: Represents a filter for a single column.

name: Filters
summary: A collection of Filter objects that represents all the filters in an autofiltered range.

name: Floor
summary: Represents the floor of a 3D chart.

name: Font
summary: Contains the font attributes (font name, font size, color, and so on) for an object.

name: FormatColor
summary: Represents the fill color specified for a threshold of a color scale conditional format or the color of the bar in a data bar conditional format.

name: FormatCondition
summary: Represents a conditional format.

name: FormatConditions
summary: Represents the collection of conditional formats for a single range.

name: FreeformBuilder
summary: Represents the geometry of a freeform while it's being built.

name: Graphic
summary: Contains properties that apply to header and footer picture objects.

name: Gridlines
summary: Represents major or minor gridlines on a chart axis.

name: GroupShapes
summary: Represents the individual shapes within a grouped shape.

name: HPageBreak
summary: Represents a horizontal page break.

name: HPageBreaks
summary: The collection of horizontal page breaks within the print area.

name: HeaderFooter
summary: Represents a single header or footer. The HeaderFooter object is a member of the HeadersFooters collection.

name: HiLoLines
summary: Represents the high-low lines in a chart group.

name: Hyperlink
summary: Represents a hyperlink.

name: Hyperlinks
summary: Represents the collection of hyperlinks for a worksheet or range.

name: IRTDUpdateEvent
summary: Represents real-time data update events.

name: IRtdServer
summary: Represents an interface for a real-time data server.

name: Icon
summary: Represents a single icon in an icon set used in a conditional formatting rule.

name: IconCriteria
summary: Represents the collection of IconCriterion objects. Each IconCriterion object represents the values and threshold type for each icon in an icon set conditional formatting rule.

name: IconCriterion
summary: Represents the criterion for an individual icon in an icon set. The criterion specifies the range of values and the threshold type associated with the icon in an icon set conditional formatting rule.

name: IconSet
summary: Represents a single set of icons that are used in an icon set conditional formatting rule.

name: IconSetCondition
summary: Represents an icon set conditional formatting rule.

name: IconSets
summary: Represents a collection of icon sets used in an icon set conditional formatting rule.

name: Interior
summary: Represents the interior of an object.

name: LeaderLines
summary: Represents leader lines on a chart. Leader lines connect data labels to data points.

name: Legend
summary: Represents the legend in a chart. Each chart can have only one legend.

name: LegendEntries
summary: A collection of all the LegendEntry.md) objects in the specified chart legend.

name: LegendEntry
summary: Represents a legend entry in a chart legend.

name: LegendKey
summary: Represents a legend key in a chart legend.

name: LineFormat
summary: Represents line and arrowhead formatting.

name: LinearGradient
summary: The LinearGradient object transitions through a series of colors in a linear manner along a specific angle.

name: LinkFormat
summary: Contains linked OLE object properties.

name: ListColumn
summary: Represents a column in a table.

name: ListColumns
summary: A collection of all the ListColumn objects in the specified ListObject object.

name: ListDataFormat
summary: The ListDataFormat object holds all the data type properties of the ListColumn object. These properties are read-only.

name: ListObject
summary: Represents a list object in the ListObjects collection.

name: ListObjects
summary: A collection of all the ListObject objects on a worksheet. Each ListObject object represents a table on the worksheet.

name: ListRow
summary: Represents a row in a table. The ListRow object is a member of the ListRows collection.

name: ListRows
summary: A collection of all the ListRow objects in the specified ListObject object.

name: Mailer
summary: You have requested Help for a Visual Basic keyword used only on the Macintosh. For information about this keyword, consult the language reference Help included with Microsoft Office Macintosh Edition.

name: Model
summary: Documentation page for Excel.Model.

name: Model3DFormat
summary: Represents the properties of a 3D model shape.

name: ModuleView
summary: [!NOTE]

name: MultiThreadedCalculation
summary: Returns or sets the concurrent calculation mode.

name: Name
summary: Represents a defined name for a range of cells. Names can be either built-in names—such as Database, PrintArea, and AutoOpen—or custom names.

name: Names
summary: A collection of all the Name objects in the application or workbook.

name: NegativeBarFormat
summary: Represents the color settings of the data bars for negative values that are defined by a data bar conditional formating rule.

name: ODBCConnection
summary: Represents the ODBC connection.

name: ODBCError
summary: Represents an ODBC error generated by the most recent ODBC query.

name: ODBCErrors
summary: A collection of ODBCError objects.

name: OLEDBConnection
summary: Represents the OLE DB connection.

name: OLEDBError
summary: Represents an OLE DB error returned by the most recent OLE DB query.

name: OLEDBErrors
summary: A collection of OLEDBError objects.

name: OLEFormat
summary: Contains OLE object properties.

name: OLEObject
summary: Represents an ActiveX control or a linked or embedded OLE object on a worksheet.

name: OLEObjects
summary: A collection of all the OLEObject objects on the specified worksheet.

name: Outline
summary: Represents an outline on a worksheet.

name: Page
summary: Represents a page in a workbook. Use the Page object and the related methods and properties for programmatically defining page layout in a workbook.

name: PageSetup
summary: Represents the page setup description.

name: Pages
summary: A collection of pages in a document. Use the Pages collection and the related objects and properties for programmatically defining page layout in a workbook.

name: Pane
summary: Represents a pane of a window.

name: Panes
summary: A collection of all the Pane objects shown in the specified window.

name: Parameter
summary: Represents a single parameter used in a parameter query.

name: Parameters
summary: A collection of Parameter objects for the specified query table.

name: Phonetic
summary: Contains information about a specific phonetic text string in a cell.

name: Phonetics
summary: A collection of all the Phonetic objects in the specified range.

name: PictureFormat
summary: Contains properties and methods that apply to pictures and OLE objects.

name: PivotAxis
summary: The PivotAxis object is used for asymmetric drilling in a PivotTable.

name: PivotCache
summary: Represents the memory cache for a PivotTable report.

name: PivotCaches
summary: Represents the collection of memory caches from the PivotTable reports in a workbook.

name: PivotCell
summary: Represents a cell in a PivotTable report.

name: PivotField
summary: Represents a field in a PivotTable report.

name: PivotFields
summary: A collection of all the PivotField objects in a PivotTable report.

name: PivotFilter
summary: A PivotFilter is applied to a PivotField object.

name: PivotFilters
summary: The PivotFilters object is a collection of PivotFilter objects.

name: PivotFormula
summary: Represents a formula used to calculate results in a PivotTable report.

name: PivotFormulas
summary: Represents the collection of formulas for a PivotTable report. Each formula is represented by a PivotFormula object.

name: PivotItem
summary: Represents an item in a PivotTable field.

name: PivotItemList
summary: A collection of all the PivotItem objects in the specified PivotTable.

name: PivotItems
summary: A collection of all the PivotItem objects in a PivotTable field.

name: PivotLayout
summary: Represents the placement of fields in a PivotChart report.

name: PivotLine
summary: A PivotLine object is a line of rows or columns in an Excel PivotTable.

name: PivotLineCells
summary: Collection of PivotCell objects for a specific PivotLine.

name: PivotLines
summary: The PivotLines object is a collection of lines in a PivotTable, containing all lines on rows or columns of the pivot. Each line is a set of PivotCell objects.

name: PivotTable
summary: Represents a PivotTable report on a worksheet.

name: PivotTableChangeList
summary: Represents the list of changes a user has made to value cells in a PivotTable report based on an OLAP data source.

name: PivotTables
summary: A collection of all the PivotTable objects in the specified workbook.

name: PlotArea
summary: Represents the plot area of a chart.

name: Point
summary: Represents a single point in a series in a chart.

name: Points
summary: A collection of all the Point.md) objects in the specified series in a chart.

name: ProtectedViewWindow
summary: Represents a Protected View window.

name: ProtectedViewWindows
summary: A collection of the ProtectedViewWindow objects that represent all the Protected View windows that are currently open in the application.

name: Protection
summary: Represents the various types of protection options available for a worksheet.

name: PublishObject
summary: Represents an item in a workbook that has been saved to a webpage and can be refreshed according to values specified by the properties and methods of the PublishObject object.

name: PublishObjects
summary: A collection of all PublishObject objects in the workbook.

name: QueryTable
summary: Represents a worksheet table built from data returned from an external data source, such as a SQL server or a Microsoft Access database.

name: QueryTables
summary: A collection of QueryTable objects.

name: RTD
summary: Represents a real-time data object.

name: Range
summary: Represents a cell, a row, a column, a selection of cells containing one or more contiguous blocks of cells, or a 3D range.

name: Ranges
summary: A collection of Range.md) objects.

name: RecentFile
summary: Represents a file in the list of recently used files.

name: RecentFiles
summary: Represents the list of recently used files.

name: RectangularGradient
summary: The RectangularGradient object transitions through a series of colors in a linear manner along a specific angle.

name: Research
summary: Represents the controls of a Research query.

name: RoutingSlip
summary: [!NOTE]

name: Scenario
summary: Represents a scenario on a worksheet.

name: Scenarios
summary: A collection of all the Scenario objects on the specified worksheet.

name: Series
summary: Represents a series in a chart.

name: SeriesCollection
summary: A collection of all the Series.md) objects in the specified chart or chart group.

name: SeriesLines
summary: Represents series lines in a chart group.

name: ServerViewableItems
summary: A collection of objects that have been marked as viewable on the server.

name: ShadowFormat
summary: Represents shadow formatting for a shape.

name: Shape
summary: Represents an object in the drawing layer, such as an AutoShape, freeform, OLE object, or picture.

name: ShapeNode
summary: Represents the geometry and the geometry-editing properties of the nodes in a user-defined freeform.

name: ShapeNodes
summary: A collection of all the ShapeNode objects in the specified freeform.

name: ShapeRange
summary: Represents a shape range, which is a set of shapes on a document.

name: Shapes
summary: A collection of all the Shape objects on the specified sheet.

name: SheetViews
summary: A collection of all the sheet views in the specified or active workbook window.

name: Sheets
summary: A collection of all the sheets in the specified or active workbook.

name: Slicer
summary: Represents a slicer in a workbook.

name: SlicerCache
summary: Represents the current filter state for a slicer, and information about which PivotCache or WorkbookConnection object the slicer is connected to.

name: SlicerCacheLevel
summary: Represents a level of a hierarchy in an OLAP data source being filtered by a slicer.

name: SlicerCacheLevels
summary: Represents the collection of hierarchy levels for the OLAP data source that is filtered by a slicer.

name: SlicerCaches
summary: Represents the collection of slicer caches associated with the specified workbook.

name: SlicerItem
summary: Represents an item in a slicer.

name: SlicerItems
summary: Represents the collection of SlicerItem objects contained in a SlicerCache or SlicerCacheLevel object.

name: SlicerPivotTables
summary: Represents information about the collection of PivotTables associated with the specified SlicerCache object.

name: Slicers
summary: A collection of Slicer objects.

name: Sort
summary: Represents a sort of a range of data.

name: SortField
summary: The SortField object contains all the sort information for the Worksheet, ListObject, and AutoFilter objects.

name: SortFields
summary: The SortFields collection is a collection of SortField objects. It allows developers to store a sort state on workbooks, lists, and autofilters.

name: SparkAxes
summary: Represents the settings for the horizontal and vertical axes of a group of sparklines.

name: SparkColor
summary: Represents the color of the horizontal axis and the markers for points in a sparkline.

name: SparkHorizontalAxis
summary: Represents the settings for the horizontal axes of a group of sparklines.

name: SparkPoints
summary: Represents the settings of the markers for points of data on a sparkline.

name: SparkVerticalAxis
summary: Represents the settings for the vertical axes of a group of sparklines.

name: Sparkline
summary: Represents a single sparkline.

name: SparklineGroup
summary: Represents a group of sparklines.

name: SparklineGroups
summary: Represents a collection of sparkline groups.

name: Speech
summary: Contains methods and properties that pertain to speech.

name: SpellingOptions
summary: Represents the various spell checking options for a worksheet.

name: Style
summary: Represents a style description for a range.

name: Styles
summary: A collection of all the Style objects in the specified or active workbook.

name: Tab
summary: Represents the tab of a chart or a worksheet.

name: TableStyle
summary: Represents a single style that can be applied to a table or slicer.

name: TableStyleElement
summary: Represents a single table style element.

name: TableStyleElements
summary: Represents table style elements.

name: TableStyles
summary: Represents styles that can be applied to a table.

name: TextEffectFormat
summary: Contains properties and methods that apply to WordArt objects.

name: TextFrame
summary: Represents the text frame in a Shape object. Contains the text in the text frame as well as the properties and methods that control the alignment and anchoring of the text frame.

name: TextFrame2
summary: Represents the text frame in a Shape, ShapeRange, or ChartFormat object.

name: ThreeDFormat
summary: Represents a shape's three-dimensional formatting.

name: TickLabels
summary: Represents the tick-mark labels associated with tick marks on a chart axis.

name: Top10
summary: Represents a top ten visual of a conditional formatting rule. Applying a color to a range helps you see the value of a cell relative to other cells.

name: TreeviewControl
summary: Represents the hierarchical member-selection control of a cube field.

name: Trendline
summary: Represents a trendline in a chart.

name: Trendlines
summary: A collection of all the Trendline.md) objects for the specified series.

name: UniqueValues
summary: The UniqueValues object uses the DupeUnique property to return or set an enum that determines whether the rule should look for duplicate or unique values in the range.

name: UpBars
summary: Represents the up bars in a chart group.

name: UsedObjects
summary: Represents objects that have been allocated in a workbook.

name: UserAccess
summary: Represents the user access for a protected range.

name: UserAccessList
summary: A collection of UserAccess objects that represents the user access for protected ranges.

name: VPageBreak
summary: Represents a vertical page break.

name: VPageBreaks
summary: A collection of vertical page breaks within the print area.

name: Validation
summary: Represents data validation for a worksheet range.

name: ValueChange
summary: Represents a value that has been changed in a PivotTable report that is based on an OLAP data source.

name: Walls
summary: Represents the walls of a 3D chart. This object isn't a collection. There's no object that represents a single wall; you must return all the walls as a unit.

name: Watch
summary: Represents a range that is tracked when the worksheet is recalculated. The Watch object allows users to verify the accuracy of their models and debug problems that they encounter.

name: Watches
summary: A collection of all the Watch objects in a specified application.

name: WebOptions
summary: Contains workbook-level attributes used by Microsoft Excel when you save a document as a webpage or open a webpage.

name: Window
summary: Represents a window.

name: Windows
summary: A collection of all the Window objects in Microsoft Excel.

name: Workbook
summary: Represents a Microsoft Excel workbook.

name: WorkbookConnection
summary: A connection is a set of information needed to obtain data from an external data source other than a Microsoft Excel workbook.

name: Workbooks
summary: A collection of all the Workbook objects that are currently open in the Microsoft Excel application.

name: Worksheet
summary: Represents a worksheet.

name: WorksheetFunction
summary: Used as a container for Microsoft Excel worksheet functions that can be called from Visual Basic.

name: WorksheetView
summary: An object that defines the behavior of a single worksheet view.

name: Worksheets
summary: A collection of all the Worksheet objects in the specified or active workbook. Each Worksheet object represents a worksheet.

name: XPath
summary: Represents an XPath that has been mapped to a Range.md) or ListColumn object.

name: XmlDataBinding
summary: Represents the connection to the source data for an XmlMap object.

name: XmlMap
summary: Represents an XML map that has been added to a workbook.

name: XmlMaps
summary: Represents the collection of XmlMap objects that have been added to a workbook.

name: XmlNamespace
summary: Represents a namespace that has been added to a workbook.

name: XmlNamespaces
summary: Represents the collection of XmlNamespace objects in a workbook.

name: XmlSchema
summary: Represents an XML schema contained by an XmlMap object.

name: XmlSchemas
summary: Represents the collection of XmlSchema objects contained by an XmlMap object.
